logos.title: Trusted by creators, agencies, and product teams

introduce.title: Meet GPT Image 2 – OpenAI's flagship image model, released April 2026
introduce.description: GPT Image 2 tops the Image Arena leaderboard with native 4K output, 99% typography accuracy, and built-in reasoning. Everything you need to go from idea to production-ready visual in a single prompt.

items.title: Photoreal by default
items.description: Studio-grade lighting, skin, and texture out of the box – no style prompt required.

items.title: Reference-guided editing
items.description: Upload an image and describe the change. GPT Image 2 keeps character, brand, and typography consistent across every iteration.

items.title: Native 4K output
items.description: Render at up to 4K on any aspect ratio – campaign-grade, print-ready, and detailed enough for hero visuals.

items.title: Thinks before it draws
items.description: GPT Image 2 plans composition, checks typography, and can search the web mid-generation – the first image model with native reasoning built in.

benefits.title: Why creators choose GPT Image 2
benefits.description: What you get when GPT Image 2 replaces your whole image stack.

items.title: Sharper typography for production drafts
items.description: GPT Image 2 lifts text rendering across posters, UI mocks, infographics, and multilingual layouts – including Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Hindi, and Bengali – so most copy lands clean on the first generation.

items.title: Consistent character direction across panels
items.description: Generate up to 8 related frames from a single GPT Image 2 prompt. Identity, brand colors, and composition track closely across panels – built for storyboards, campaign sets, and reference-driven iteration.

items.title: Fast drafts with token-based pricing
items.description: Run quick low-quality drafts to iterate, then commit to medium- or high-quality renders. GPT Image 2 charges per render with token-based pricing – no per-seat subscriptions.

usage.title: From idea to image in four steps
usage.description: GPT Image 2 fits any creative process – from quick ideation to shipping a final asset.

items.title: Describe
items.description: Type what you want. Add references, set ratio, pick PNG or JPG.

items.title: Generate
items.description: GPT Image 2 thinks before it draws – planning composition, checking text, and producing a finished image in under a minute.

items.title: Refine
items.description: Iterate with natural-language edits. Swap background, add copy, or retouch details.

items.title: Export
items.description: Download 1K / 2K / 4K. Use in campaigns, products, decks, social – wherever.

features.title: Everything GPT Image 2 can do
features.description: A growing toolkit of generation and editing capabilities, all from one prompt box.

items.title: Text to Image
items.description: Generate originals from a prompt – posters, products, portraits, illustrations – with photoreal detail out of the box.

items.title: Image to Image
items.description: Upload a reference and describe the edit. Character, brand, and composition stay consistent across every iteration.

items.title: Aspect & Resolution
items.description: 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4 and more – render natively at up to 4K for print-ready, campaign-grade work.

items.title: Text-in-Image
items.description: 99% typography accuracy inside generated images – menus, posters, infographics, and UI screens read correctly on the first pass.

items.title: Multi-panel generation
items.description: Produce up to eight coherent panels from a single prompt – storyboards, campaign sets, and manga pages with consistent characters and colors.

items.title: PNG & JPG export
items.description: Ship finals in lossless PNG or lightweight JPG for web, print, and social.

faq.title: GPT Image FAQ
faq.description: A quick guide to what changes between GPT Image 2 and GPT Image 1.5 on this landing.

items.question: Which GPT Image models are available here?
items.answer: This landing supports GPT Image 2 text-to-image, GPT Image 2 image-to-image, GPT Image 1.5 text-to-image, and GPT Image 1.5 image-to-image.

items.question: What is different about GPT Image 2?
items.answer: GPT Image 2 exposes resolution controls on this landing, so you can choose 1K, 2K, or 4K depending on the workflow.

items.question: What is different about GPT Image 1.5?
items.answer: GPT Image 1.5 uses a quality setting instead of resolution on this landing, with medium for balanced output and high for slower, more detailed results.

items.question: Do both models support text-to-image and image-to-image?
items.answer: Yes. Both GPT Image 2 and GPT Image 1.5 support prompt-only generation and reference-based editing.

items.question: How do reference images work here?
items.answer: In image-to-image mode, you upload one or more images first and then guide the edit with a prompt plus aspect-ratio controls.

items.question: How should I choose between them?
items.answer: Choose GPT Image 2 when resolution is the main control you care about. Choose GPT Image 1.5 when you prefer a simpler quality toggle between medium and high.

cta.title: Try GPT Image 2 and GPT Image 1.5 on this landing
cta.description: Switch between text-to-image and image-to-image, compare resolution and quality controls, and generate directly from the homepage.

showcase.title: Four core capabilities of GPT Image 2
showcase.description: These four examples show what GPT Image 2 is especially strong at: premium product ads, structured visual explainers, consistent character sheets, and style-rich art direction.
